top.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
top.summary: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

top.title: Lebanon says ceasefire must be in place before Israel talks
top.summary: Lebanon will only take part in talks with Israel if a ceasefire is already in place, a senior official tells the BBC.

top.title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
top.summary: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.

top.title: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
top.summary: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.

top.title: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
top.summary: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California

top.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
top.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
